TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Lin Chi-ling (1974.11.29) tatayna, nalecuhan i Taywan Taypak. u singanganay a model, tatayna palaway atu telunay. napahezek i Canada Tolunto tabakiay a cacudadan, minanam tu kulitay atu kyizay. singangan tu ci Lin Chiling i 2004 a mihcan, matineng tu ku binawlan cinizaan. 2008 a mihcan, mipalaw iga "sumanahay cabeng", 2010 a mihcan mipalaw nu Lipunay a iga "mamidang nu bulad". u siwkay niza u sapuyaay a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sulit nu Hulam Instagram, Facebook專頁. u sulit nu Amilika Lin Chi-ling (born 29 November 1974) is a Taiwanese actress, model and television host. u kawlah niza u sangulan nu kitakit a singkiw 2007 a mihcan FHM kitakit cacay lasubuay a sanuglan tatayna sakacacay 2007年FHM全球百大美女第一名 2008 a mihcan FHM kitakit cacay lasubuay a sanuglan tatayna sakacacay 2008年FHM全球百大美女第一名 2009 a mihcan FHM kitakit cacay lasubuay a sanuglan tatayna sakacacay 2009年FHM全球百大美女第一名 2010 a mihcan FHM kitakit cacay lasubuay a sanuglan tatayna sakacacay 2010年FHM全球百大美女第一名 2011 a mihcan FHM kitakit cacay lasubuay a sanuglan tatayna sakalima 2011年FHM全球百大美女第五名 2012 a mihcan FHM kitakit cacay lasubuay a sanuglan tatayna sakatulu 2012年FHM全球百大美女第三名 2013 a mihcan FHM kitakit cacay lasubuay a sanuglan tatayna sakasepat 2013年FHM全球百大美女第四名 2014 a mihcan FHM kitakit cacay lasubuay a sanuglan tatayna sakawalu 2014年FHM全球百大美女第八名 2015 a mihcan FHM kitakit cacay lasubuay a sanuglan tatayna sakaenem 2015年FHM全球百大美女第六名 2016 a mihcan FHM kitakit cacay lasubuay a sanuglan tatayna sakasiwa 2016年FHM全球百大美女第九名
S.PHON: r~ɾin ʦħi-r~ɾiŋ (****.**.**) tatajna, nar~ɾəʦuħan i tajwan tajpak. u siŋaŋanaj a modər~ɾ, tatajna par~ɾawaj atu tər~ɾunaj. napaħəzək i ʦanada tor~ɾunto tabakiaj a ʦaʦudadan, minanam tu kur~ɾitaj atu kjizaj. siŋaŋan tu ʦi r~ɾin ʦħir~ɾiŋ i **** a miħʦan, matinəŋ tu ku binawr~ɾan ʦinizaan. **** a miħʦan, mipar~ɾaw iga "sumanaħaj ʦabəŋ", **** a miħʦan mipar~ɾaw nu r~ɾipunaj a iga "mamidaŋ nu bur~ɾad". u siwkaj niza u sapujaaj a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sur~ɾit nu ħur~ɾam instagram, faʦəbook**. u sur~ɾit nu amir~ɾika r~ɾin ʦħi-r~ɾiŋ (born ** no*əmbər ****) is a taiwanəsə aʦtrəss, modər~ɾ and tər~ɾə*ision ħost. u kawr~ɾaħ niza u saŋur~ɾan nu kitakit a siŋkiw **** a miħʦan fħm kitakit ʦaʦaj r~ɾasubuaj a sanugr~ɾan tatajna sakaʦaʦaj *****fħm********* **** a miħʦan fħm kitakit ʦaʦaj r~ɾasubuaj a sanugr~ɾan tatajna sakaʦaʦaj *****fħm********* **** a miħʦan fħm kitakit ʦaʦaj r~ɾasubuaj a sanugr~ɾan tatajna sakaʦaʦaj *****fħm********* **** a miħʦan fħm kitakit ʦaʦaj r~ɾasubuaj a sanugr~ɾan tatajna sakaʦaʦaj *****fħm********* **** a miħʦan fħm kitakit ʦaʦaj r~ɾasubuaj a sanugr~ɾan tatajna sakar~ɾima *****fħm********* **** a miħʦan fħm kitakit ʦaʦaj r~ɾasubuaj a sanugr~ɾan tatajna sakatur~ɾu *****fħm********* **** a miħʦan fħm kitakit ʦaʦaj r~ɾasubuaj a sanugr~ɾan tatajna sakasəpat *****fħm********* **** a miħʦan fħm kitakit ʦaʦaj r~ɾasubuaj a sanugr~ɾan tatajna sakawar~ɾu *****fħm********* **** a miħʦan fħm kitakit ʦaʦaj r~ɾasubuaj a sanugr~ɾan tatajna sakaənəm *****fħm********* **** a miħʦan fħm kitakit ʦaʦaj r~ɾasubuaj a sanugr~ɾan tatajna sakasiwa *****fħm*********
S.FORM: Lin Chi-ling (1974.11.29) tatayna, nalecuhan i Taywan Taypak. u singanganay a model, tatayna palaway atu telunay. napahezek i Canada Tolunto tabakiay a cacudadan, minanam tu kulitay atu kyizay. singangan tu ci Lin Chiling i 2004 a mihcan, matineng tu ku binawlan cinizaan. 2008 a mihcan, mipalaw iga "sumanahay cabeng", 2010 a mihcan mipalaw nu Lipunay a iga "mamidang nu bulad". u siwkay niza u sapuyaay a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sulit nu Hulam Instagram, Facebook專頁. u sulit nu Amilika Lin Chi-ling (born 29 November 1974) is a Taiwanese actress, model and television host. u kawlah niza u sangulan nu kitakit a singkiw 2007 a mihcan FHM kitakit cacay lasubuay a sanuglan tatayna sakacacay 2007年FHM全球百大美女第一名 2008 a mihcan FHM kitakit cacay lasubuay a sanuglan tatayna sakacacay 2008年FHM全球百大美女第一名 2009 a mihcan FHM kitakit cacay lasubuay a sanuglan tatayna sakacacay 2009年FHM全球百大美女第一名 2010 a mihcan FHM kitakit cacay lasubuay a sanuglan tatayna sakacacay 2010年FHM全球百大美女第一名 2011 a mihcan FHM kitakit cacay lasubuay a sanuglan tatayna sakalima 2011年FHM全球百大美女第五名 2012 a mihcan FHM kitakit cacay lasubuay a sanuglan tatayna sakatulu 2012年FHM全球百大美女第三名 2013 a mihcan FHM kitakit cacay lasubuay a sanuglan tatayna sakasepat 2013年FHM全球百大美女第四名 2014 a mihcan FHM kitakit cacay lasubuay a sanuglan tatayna sakawalu 2014年FHM全球百大美女第八名 2015 a mihcan FHM kitakit cacay lasubuay a sanuglan tatayna sakaenem 2015年FHM全球百大美女第六名 2016 a mihcan FHM kitakit cacay lasubuay a sanuglan tatayna sakasiwa 2016年FHM全球百大美女第九名
S.PHON: r~ɾin ʦħi-r~ɾiŋ (****.**.**) tatajna, nar~ɾəʦuħan i tajwan tajpak. u siŋaŋanaj a modər~ɾ, tatajna par~ɾawaj atu tər~ɾunaj. napaħəzək i ʦanada tor~ɾunto tabakiaj a ʦaʦudadan, minanam tu kur~ɾitaj atu kjizaj. siŋaŋan tu ʦi r~ɾin ʦħir~ɾiŋ i **** a miħʦan, matinəŋ tu ku binawr~ɾan ʦinizaan. **** a miħʦan, mipar~ɾaw iga "sumanaħaj ʦabəŋ", **** a miħʦan mipar~ɾaw nu r~ɾipunaj a iga "mamidaŋ nu bur~ɾad". u siwkaj niza u sapujaaj a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sur~ɾit nu ħur~ɾam instagram, faʦəbook**. u sur~ɾit nu amir~ɾika r~ɾin ʦħi-r~ɾiŋ (born ** no*əmbər ****) is a taiwanəsə aʦtrəss, modər~ɾ and tər~ɾə*ision ħost. u kawr~ɾaħ niza u saŋur~ɾan nu kitakit a siŋkiw **** a miħʦan fħm kitakit ʦaʦaj r~ɾasubuaj a sanugr~ɾan tatajna sakaʦaʦaj *****fħm********* **** a miħʦan fħm kitakit ʦaʦaj r~ɾasubuaj a sanugr~ɾan tatajna sakaʦaʦaj *****fħm********* **** a miħʦan fħm kitakit ʦaʦaj r~ɾasubuaj a sanugr~ɾan tatajna sakaʦaʦaj *****fħm********* **** a miħʦan fħm kitakit ʦaʦaj r~ɾasubuaj a sanugr~ɾan tatajna sakaʦaʦaj *****fħm********* **** a miħʦan fħm kitakit ʦaʦaj r~ɾasubuaj a sanugr~ɾan tatajna sakar~ɾima *****fħm********* **** a miħʦan fħm kitakit ʦaʦaj r~ɾasubuaj a sanugr~ɾan tatajna sakatur~ɾu *****fħm********* **** a miħʦan fħm kitakit ʦaʦaj r~ɾasubuaj a sanugr~ɾan tatajna sakasəpat *****fħm********* **** a miħʦan fħm kitakit ʦaʦaj r~ɾasubuaj a sanugr~ɾan tatajna sakawar~ɾu *****fħm********* **** a miħʦan fħm kitakit ʦaʦaj r~ɾasubuaj a sanugr~ɾan tatajna sakaənəm *****fħm********* **** a miħʦan fħm kitakit ʦaʦaj r~ɾasubuaj a sanugr~ɾan tatajna sakasiwa *****fħm*********
